parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Column to sort by. Prefix with - for descending (e.g. -name)

parameters.name: archived
parameters.description: Include archived records: 0 = active only (default), 1 = archived only

parameters.name: included[]
parameters.description: IDs to always include in results

parameters.name: table_specifications
parameters.description: Include table column specifications in response
